headline: Wondering what's happening in today's S&P500  pre-market session?
summary: Before the opening bell on Friday, let's take a glimpse of the US markets and explore the S&P500 top gainers and losers in today's pre-market session.

headline: Chip Stocks' Worst Month Ever Versus Software: Is the AI Trade Cracking?
summary: SOXX has fallen 19.95% against IGV in July, the worst month on record. Yet, chip earnings estimates are intact — only the multiple broke.
